summary: Software Engineer with 5 years of experience developing robust and scalable applications. Proficient in Python, React, and AWS, I am skilled in building full-stack solutions and deploying cloud-native services.
feedback: To make this summary even stronger, consider adding quantifiable achievements and specific examples of your impact in previous roles. For instance, mention how you leveraged Python, React, or AWS to improve performance, reduce costs, or streamline processes. Including specific types of projects you've excelled in or the industries you have experience with would also provide valuable context and further highlight your value proposition.
